channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-08
item.description:
Our community has seen significant activity across multiple projects, with notable updates in `statcheck`, `docpluck`, `coarse`, `escicheck`, `auto-zcurve`, and `output-it-forward`. MicheleNuijten's administrative updates to `statcheck` and the re-enabling of Fable 5 in the `coarse` model picker by Davidvandijcke are particularly noteworthy. Meanwhile, `docpluck` and `escicheck` have seen fixes and updates to issues and documentation, showcasing the connections between these projects and their shared goal of improving research tools. The addition of a Chrome Webstore link for `output-it-forward` and the revision of the validation note in `auto-zcurve` demonstrate the community's commitment to making research more accessible and user-friendly. These updates highlight the collaborative spirit and dedication to progress that defines our community.

57 commits across 6 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

docpluck27 commits
metacheck19 commits
regcheck4 commits
escicheck3 commits
statcheck2 commits

item.title: metacheck: 1 commit today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

The `data_check` branch was worked on, where the cache was improved, the original data is now kept, and hardcoded folders were made better. The commit on the `data_check` branch specifically aimed to enhance the caching mechanism and retain the original data. No other branches were modified in this set of commits. The changes were focused on refining how data is handled and stored within the `data_check` branch. The hardcoded folders were also revised for better functionality, as stated in the commit message.

1 commit(s) today:

  • c799dcf [data_check] improve cache, keep original data, better hardcoded folders — Lakens
  • 0c8303d [data_check] fix bugs, add archive report, gate large github repos, improve feedback — Lakens
  • 2615ab2 [data_check] updates osf download — Lakens
  • 58122ed [data_check] updates to functions, fix bugs — Lakens
  • ad4cb14 [data_check] improvements — Lakens
  • a73d52a [jw_llm_fixes] fix(llm): correct ollama-native gate (&& not %%); fail-fast param/model checks — Jakub Werner
  • d99956e [jw_plumber_bibr_api] feat(plumber): bibr-JSON REST API — validated uploads, HTML report, hardened runtime — Jakub Werner
  • 4daee8c [jw_bibr_read_passthrough] feat(read): let bibr abstract and figure/table captions flow through — Jakub Werner
  • 00d98b8 [jw_grobid_text_fix] fix(grobid): stop anchor normalization from corrupting paper text — Jakub Werner
  • 4d53313 [jw_schema_sync_10_5] fix(schema): sync bundled paper.json to bibr v10.5 — Jakub Werner
  • fdc5a1d [jw_fable_fixes] tests: fix test_that wrapper warnings, add expect_disjoint, env-aware .onLoad test — Jakub Werner
  • 994fb58 [jw_fable_fixes] modules: fix code_check green path, ref_miscitation report, traffic lights, stale imports — Jakub Werner
  • de6fd04 [jw_fable_fixes] core: fix GROBID text corruption, LLM crashes, API hardening — Jakub Werner
  • d91dc7e [jw_fable_fixes] read: let bibr abstract and figure/table captions flow through .read_bibr — Jakub Werner
  • 9483c49 [jw_fable_fixes] plumber: DRY endpoint pipeline, /modules endpoint, report=false, hardened Docker runtime — Jakub Werner
  • c42ecbf [data_check] Transparent resource caps, LLM/download controls, data-manifest + archive tooling — Lakens
  • 342b25c [data_check] additions — Lakens
  • bd8c890 [data_check] first version of datacheck modules — Lakens
  • 41a54be [data_check] prevent double crossref api, log errors — Lakens
  • bb7a5ee [data_check] updated ref_accuracy, validated. Minor fixes to reg_check and ref_consistency — Lakens

View all commits →

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where administrative updates were made. As stated in the commit message, "admin updates" were performed, but the specifics of these updates are not detailed. The branch was then merged into itself, as indicated by the message "Merge branch 'feature-non-apa-newer' of https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck into feature-non-apa-newer". No other branches were mentioned in the provided commits. The changes were made by MicheleNuijten. The commit messages do not provide further information on the nature of the administrative updates.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
